name: Orange County Convention Center
description: The second-largest convention center in the United States at 7 million square feet, hosting over 200 major trade shows, conferences, and consumer expos annually on International Drive.

name: Tampa Convention Center
description: A 600,000 square foot waterfront convention facility in downtown Tampa on the Riverwalk, hosting trade shows, conventions, and major community events year-round.

name: Ocean Center
address: 101 N Atlantic Ave, Daytona Beach, FL 32118
description: Daytona Beach's premier beachside convention and entertainment venue with over 200,000 square feet of flexible event space, hosting concerts, conventions, and sporting events.

name: Broward County Convention Center
description: A 600,000 square foot convention center adjacent to Port Everglades and Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport, currently undergoing a major expansion project.

name: Palm Beach County Convention Center
address: 650 Okeechobee Blvd, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
description: A 350,000 square foot meeting and exhibition center in downtown West Palm Beach connected to the Hilton, hosting trade shows, conventions, and community events.

name: Miami Beach Convention Center
address: 1901 Convention Center Dr, Miami Beach, FL 33139
description: A recently renovated 1.4 million square foot convention center hosting Art Basel, boat shows, and major international events. One of the premier event venues in the southeastern United States.

name: Gaylord Palms Resort and Convention Center
description: A 1,718-room resort featuring 400,000 square feet of meeting and convention space under a massive glass atrium with Florida-themed indoor gardens and a full-service spa.

name: Rosen Shingle Creek
description: A 1,501-room resort on Universal Boulevard with 524,000 square feet of meeting space, an 18-hole golf course, and a full-service spa. One of Orlando's premier convention hotels.

name: Hilton Orlando
description: A 1,417-room convention hotel connected to the Orange County Convention Center by a covered walkway, featuring 175,000 square feet of meeting space and resort amenities.

name: Hyatt Regency Orlando
description: A 1,641-room convention hotel connected to the Orange County Convention Center, featuring 315,000 square feet of meeting space and a rooftop terrace with panoramic views.

name: Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin Resort
description: A Marriott-operated resort within Walt Disney World featuring 2,267 rooms and 331,000 square feet of meeting space, with walking access to EPCOT and Hollywood Studios.

name: Disney's Coronado Springs Resort
address: 1000 W Buena Vista Dr, Orlando, FL 32830
description: A Disney convention resort featuring 2,385 rooms including the Gran Destino Tower, 220,000 square feet of convention space, and a stunning lakefront setting within Walt Disney World.

name: Disney's Contemporary Resort
description: An iconic Disney resort connected to Magic Kingdom by monorail, featuring 655 rooms and 115,000 square feet of event space including the Convention Center wing.

name: Loews Royal Pacific Resort at Universal Orlando
description: A 1,000-room South Pacific-themed resort at Universal Orlando with 85,000 square feet of meeting space, including a 32,000 square foot ballroom and unlimited Universal Express pass for hotel guests.

name: JW Marriott Orlando Grande Lakes
description: A luxury resort on 500 acres featuring 1,000 rooms, a Greg Norman-designed golf course, full-service spa, and 100,000 square feet of meeting and event space.

name: The Ritz-Carlton Orlando, Grande Lakes
description: A luxury 582-room Ritz-Carlton resort sharing the 500-acre Grande Lakes campus, featuring 51,000 square feet of meeting space, a world-class spa, and an 18-hole golf course.

name: Omni Orlando Resort at ChampionsGate
description: A 720-room luxury golf resort south of Disney featuring 36 holes of championship golf designed by Greg Norman, 128,000 square feet of meeting space, and a 15-acre recreation area.

name: Signia by Hilton Orlando Bonnet Creek
address: 14100 Bonnet Creek Resort Ln, Orlando, FL 32821
description: A 1,009-room luxury resort within the Walt Disney World resort area featuring 132,000 square feet of meeting space, a lazy river, golf course, and full-service spa.

name: Marriott Orlando World Center
description: One of the largest Marriott resorts in the world with 2,009 rooms, 450,000 square feet of meeting and event space, an 18-hole golf course, and a resort-style pool complex near Disney.

name: Caribe Royale Orlando
description: A recently renovated all-suite resort with 1,335 suites and 220,000 square feet of meeting and event space near Walt Disney World, featuring a tropical pool area and multiple dining options.

name: Grand Hyatt Tampa Bay
description: A waterfront resort on Tampa Bay featuring 445 rooms, 35,000 square feet of meeting space, nature trails, and a private beach. Connected to the Tampa International Airport by a complimentary shuttle.

name: JW Marriott Tampa Water Street
description: Tampa's newest luxury hotel in the Water Street development, featuring 519 rooms, 100,000 square feet of meeting and event space, and a rooftop pool with bay views.

name: Hilton Tampa Downtown
description: A 520-room downtown Tampa hotel connected to the Tampa Convention Center by a skybridge, featuring 36,000 square feet of meeting space and walkable access to the Riverwalk.

name: The Breakers Palm Beach
address: 1 S County Rd, Palm Beach, FL 33480
description: A legendary Italian Renaissance-style oceanfront resort with 538 rooms, 50,000 square feet of meeting space, two 18-hole golf courses, and a full-service spa. One of the most iconic hotels in Florida.

name: Boca Raton Resort and Club
address: 501 E Camino Real, Boca Raton, FL 33432
description: A historic 1,047-room waterfront resort spanning 200 acres with a private beach club, two 18-hole golf courses, and over 120,000 square feet of meeting and event space.

name: Fort Lauderdale Marriott Harbor Beach Resort
description: A 650-room beachfront resort on 16 acres with a quarter-mile private beach, 42,000 square feet of meeting space, and a full-service spa overlooking the Atlantic Ocean.

name: The Diplomat Beach Resort
description: A 1,000-room oceanfront resort in Hollywood featuring 209,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor event space, a beachfront pool complex, and the signature Diplomat Ballroom.

name: Seminole Hard Rock Hotel and Casino Hollywood
description: The iconic guitar-shaped hotel tower with 1,271 rooms, a 140,000 square foot casino, Hard Rock Live arena, and over 120,000 square feet of meeting and event space. A landmark entertainment destination in South Florida.

name: Fontainebleau Miami Beach
description: A legendary 1,504-room oceanfront resort on Miami Beach featuring 107,000 square feet of meeting space, the LIV nightclub, a massive pool complex, and a Lapis spa.

name: Eden Roc Miami Beach
description: A historic Art Deco oceanfront resort with 631 rooms, 70,000 square feet of meeting space, three pools, and a waterfront spa. A Mid-Century Modern icon on Collins Avenue.

name: The Don CeSar
address: 3400 Gulf Blvd, St. Pete Beach, FL 33706
description: The iconic 'Pink Palace' on St. Pete Beach is a 277-room Loews resort featuring 35,000 square feet of event space, Gulf-front dining, a full-service spa, and nearly a century of Florida history.

name: Innisbrook Resort
address: 36750 US Hwy 19 N, Palm Harbor, FL 34684
description: A 900-acre golf resort and spa featuring 72 holes of championship golf including the Copperhead Course (home of the PGA Tour Valspar Championship), 600 guest suites, and 65,000 square feet of meeting space.

name: Saddlebrook Resort
description: A 480-acre resort north of Tampa featuring 800 rooms, a tennis academy, 36 holes of golf, a full-service spa, and 90,000 square feet of meeting and event space in a secluded natural setting.

name: Amway Center
description: A 20,000-seat multi-purpose arena in downtown Orlando, home to the NBA's Orlando Magic, hosting concerts, Disney on Ice, UFC events, and corporate functions throughout the year.

name: Camping World Stadium
description: A 65,000-seat multi-purpose stadium hosting college football bowl games, the NFL Pro Bowl, major concerts, and Orlando City SC matches in downtown Orlando.

name: Raymond James Stadium
address: 4201 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33607
description: A 75,000-seat stadium home to the NFL's Tampa Bay Buccaneers, featuring an iconic pirate ship. The stadium has hosted multiple Super Bowls, national championships, and major concerts.

name: Tropicana Field
description: The domed stadium home to MLB's Tampa Bay Rays, offering baseball rain or shine plus concerts and events during the off-season in downtown St. Petersburg.

name: Amelie Arena
description: A 21,000-seat arena in downtown Tampa home to the NHL's Tampa Bay Lightning, hosting concerts, Disney on Ice, and major events on the Channelside waterfront.

name: Daytona International Speedway
address: 1801 W International Speedway Blvd, Daytona Beach, FL 32114
description: The 'World Center of Racing' and home of the Daytona 500, featuring 101,500 permanent seats and the DAYTONA Rising premium experience. The speedway hosts NASCAR, IMSA, and other motorsports events.

name: Hard Rock Stadium
address: 347 Don Shula Dr, Miami Gardens, FL 33056
description: A 65,000-seat stadium home to the NFL's Miami Dolphins and host venue for the Formula 1 Miami Grand Prix, Miami Open tennis, the Orange Bowl, and major concerts.

name: Hard Rock Live Orlando
description: A 3,000-seat live music and event venue at Universal CityWalk, hosting concerts, comedy shows, corporate events, and private parties in a state-of-the-art facility.

name: Dr. Phillips Center for the Performing Arts
description: Orlando's premier performing arts center featuring the Walt Disney Theater and Steinmetz Hall, hosting Broadway shows, concerts, ballet, and opera in downtown Orlando.

name: Duke Energy Center for the Arts - Mahaffey Theater
description: A waterfront performing arts venue in downtown St. Petersburg hosting concerts, Broadway touring shows, comedy, and private events with stunning Tampa Bay views.

name: David A. Straz Jr. Center for the Performing Arts
description: The largest performing arts center in the southeastern United States, featuring five theaters and hosting Broadway shows, concerts, dance, and opera on the Tampa Riverwalk.

name: Broward Center for the Performing Arts
description: Fort Lauderdale's premier performing arts venue hosting Broadway national tours, concerts, ballet, and opera along the Riverwalk Arts and Entertainment District.

name: Raymond F. Kravis Center for the Performing Arts
address: 701 Okeechobee Blvd, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
description: West Palm Beach's premier performing arts center hosting Broadway shows, concerts, comedy, and dance in a waterfront setting near CityPlace.

name: Adrienne Arsht Center for the Performing Arts
description: The second-largest performing arts center in the U.S., featuring three performance spaces hosting Broadway tours, Miami City Ballet, Florida Grand Opera, and major concerts on Biscayne Boulevard.

name: Bella Collina
description: A Tuscan-inspired lakefront estate on 1,700 acres in Montverde featuring an Italian-style clubhouse, Sir Nick Faldo-designed golf course, and stunning rolling hills. One of Central Florida's most sought-after wedding venues.

name: The Crystal Ballroom Orlando
description: An elegant downtown Orlando event venue featuring crystal chandeliers, a grand staircase, and versatile ballroom space for weddings, galas, and corporate events.

name: Heaven Event Center
description: A premier event venue in Orlando offering elegant ballroom space with modern amenities, customizable lighting, and full event coordination services for weddings, galas, and corporate functions.

name: The Renaissance at the Gables
address: 2505 Ponce de Leon Blvd, Coral Gables, FL 33134
description: An elegant venue in historic Coral Gables featuring European-inspired architecture, a grand ballroom with soaring ceilings, and a courtyard setting perfect for upscale weddings and events.

name: Bonnet House Museum and Gardens
address: 900 N Birch Rd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
description: A historic 35-acre estate on Fort Lauderdale Beach featuring lush tropical gardens, a historic house museum, and elegant event spaces surrounded by natural beauty just steps from the ocean.

name: The Addison
address: 2 E Camino Real, Boca Raton, FL 33432
description: An award-winning waterfront wedding and event venue in Boca Raton built in the Mediterranean Revival style by architect Addison Mizner, featuring a grand ballroom and Intracoastal Waterway views.

name: Hyatt Regency Coconut Point Resort and Spa
description: A 454-room waterfront resort on 26 acres overlooking Estero Bay, featuring 90,000 square feet of meeting space, a water park, three pools, and a private island beach accessible by boat.

name: Rosen Centre Hotel
description: A 1,334-room convention hotel connected to the Orange County Convention Center by a covered skywalk, featuring 106,000 square feet of meeting space on International Drive.

name: Rosen Plaza Hotel
description: A 800-room hotel connected to the Orange County Convention Center by a covered walkway, with 60,000 square feet of meeting and ballroom space on International Drive.

name: Grande Lakes Orlando Event Lawn
description: An expansive outdoor event lawn on the 500-acre Grande Lakes campus between the JW Marriott and Ritz-Carlton, offering lakefront event space surrounded by lush Florida nature.

name: Tavares Pavilion on the Lake
description: A lakefront event venue on Lake Dora in Tavares, featuring an open-air pavilion with stunning sunset views, a wrap-around deck, and scenic boardwalk. A unique Lake County wedding and event destination.

name: Paradise Cove
address: 12200 Lake Bryan Beach Blvd, Orlando, FL 32821
description: A private lakefront event venue near Walt Disney World featuring a white sand beach, tiki-style pavilions, and waterfront ceremony spaces. A tropical escape minutes from the theme parks.

name: Mission Inn Resort and Club
description: A 176-room lakefront resort on 1,100 rolling acres in Lake County featuring two championship golf courses, a full-service spa, and outdoor event spaces with stunning views of Florida's hills.

name: Bok Tower Gardens Event Venue
description: A stunning botanical garden wedding and event venue featuring the Singing Tower carillon as a backdrop, manicured gardens, and the historic Pinewood Estate available for ceremonies and receptions.

name: Cypress Grove Estate House
description: A romantic lakefront estate in Orlando featuring a historic house, manicured gardens, a dock extending over Lake Jessamine, and indoor-outdoor event spaces surrounded by ancient cypress trees.

name: Isleworth Golf and Country Club
address: 9000 Isleworth Country Club Blvd, Windermere, FL 34786
description: An ultra-exclusive gated community and country club in Windermere featuring an Arnold Palmer-designed championship golf course, Mediterranean-style clubhouse, and private event spaces used by celebrities and corporate executives.

name: Arnold Palmer's Bay Hill Club and Lodge
description: The legendary golf resort founded by Arnold Palmer, home to the PGA Tour's Arnold Palmer Invitational. Features 27 holes of championship golf, a boutique lodge, and event spaces with lakefront views.

name: TPC Sawgrass
address: 110 Championship Way, Ponte Vedra Beach, FL 32082
description: Home of THE PLAYERS Championship and the PGA Tour headquarters, featuring the iconic island green 17th hole, two championship courses, and the Sawgrass Marriott Resort with full conference facilities.

name: Waldorf Astoria Orlando
address: 14200 Bonnet Creek Resort Ln, Orlando, FL 32821
description: A luxury 502-room resort in the Bonnet Creek area of Walt Disney World featuring a Rees Jones-designed golf course, 42,000 square feet of event space, and the signature Bull and Bear steakhouse.

name: Four Seasons Resort Orlando at Walt Disney World
description: A luxury 444-room resort within Walt Disney World featuring a Tom Fazio-designed golf course, a massive resort pool complex, and refined meeting and event spaces with Disney fireworks views.

name: Streamsong Resort
description: A luxury golf resort on 16,000 acres in Central Florida featuring three championship courses (Red, Blue, and Black), a full-service spa built into the landscape, and meeting spaces with stunning natural views.

name: Reunion Resort
description: A 2,300-acre resort community near Disney featuring three signature golf courses designed by Arnold Palmer, Tom Watson, and Jack Nicklaus, plus vacation homes, a water park, and meeting facilities.

name: Biltmore Hotel
description: A National Historic Landmark hotel built in 1926 featuring 273 rooms, a legendary pool, an 18-hole golf course, and 60,000 square feet of event space in a Mediterranean Revival masterpiece.

name: Eau Palm Beach Resort and Spa
description: A luxury oceanfront resort on a private stretch of Palm Beach coastline featuring 309 rooms, a Forbes Five-Star spa, and 30,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor event space with ocean views.

name: PGA National Resort
address: 400 Ave of the Champions, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418
description: Home of the PGA Tour's Honda Classic, featuring 360 rooms, five championship golf courses, a full-service spa, and 40,000 square feet of meeting and event space in Palm Beach Gardens.

name: Peabody Auditorium
description: A 2,521-seat performing arts venue in Daytona Beach hosting Broadway tours, concerts, comedy shows, and community events. The venue serves as the cultural anchor of the Daytona Beach area.

name: Ruth Eckerd Hall
description: A premier performing arts venue in Clearwater designed by the Frank Lloyd Wright Foundation, hosting major concerts, Broadway shows, and events in a 2,180-seat hall.

name: Wyndham Grand Clearwater Beach
description: A beachfront resort on Clearwater Beach featuring 343 rooms, a rooftop pool bar, and over 20,000 square feet of event space with Gulf of Mexico views from the meeting rooms.

name: Hawks Cay Resort
address: 61 Hawks Cay Blvd, Duck Key, FL 33050
description: A 60-acre island resort in the Florida Keys featuring 177 rooms and villas, a saltwater lagoon, dolphin encounters, and 20,000 square feet of meeting space surrounded by turquoise waters.

name: Loews Portofino Bay Hotel at Universal Orlando
description: A 750-room luxury hotel inspired by the Italian seaside village of Portofino, featuring a harbor piazza, 42,000 square feet of meeting space, and unlimited Universal Express pass for guests.

name: Omni Amelia Island Resort
address: 6800 First Coast Hwy, Amelia Island, FL 32034
description: A 1,350-acre oceanfront resort on Amelia Island featuring 402 rooms, 36 holes of golf, a full-service spa, and 80,000 square feet of meeting and event space on a pristine barrier island.

name: Lake Nona Wave Hotel
description: A wellness-focused luxury hotel in Orlando's Lake Nona community featuring 234 rooms, biometric technology, a rooftop pool, and modern meeting spaces in one of Florida's fastest-growing innovation districts.

name: Naples Grande Beach Resort
description: A luxury Gulf-front resort with 474 rooms on a pristine private beach, featuring a championship golf course, full-service spa, and 35,000 square feet of meeting and event space.

name: The Alfond Inn at Rollins
address: 300 E New England Ave, Winter Park, FL 32789
description: A boutique luxury hotel on Park Avenue in Winter Park owned by Rollins College, featuring 112 rooms, a curated art collection, and elegant meeting spaces in one of Orlando's most charming neighborhoods.
